title: Senior Projects Manager/ Projects Manager
description:
Why Join Us?

  • Attractive Newcomer Bonus
  • Career Progression & Development Opportunities
  • Opportunity to Work Alongside an Innovative Team
  • Comprehensive Leave Packages (e.g: additional leave, birthday leave, eldercare leave, marriage leave & gift, etc...)
  • Annual Executive Health Screening


Job Responsibilities:

  • Assist the Project Director (PD) with various project functions, encompassing project management, site supervision, and risk control, to ensure the successful achievement of project objectives
  • Manage and supervise project execution, ensuring site progress is monitored closely and projects are completed on time and within budget
  • Ensure strict compliance with safety regulations and the latest Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) Act provisions throughout all project stages
  • Implement robust cost control measures to ensure projects are completed within budget, optimizing resource utilization and adhering to project schedules
  • Provide leadership and guidance to project teams, fostering a culture of excellence and accountability
  • Collaborate with relevant stakeholders to address any project-related challenges or issues effectively
  • Maintain up-to-date knowledge of relevant authorities' requirements and regulations, ensuring full compliance at all times
  • Ad-hoc duties as assigned by superior(s)

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Civil & Structural Engineering (certificates recognized by the PE Board)
  • At least 10 to 12 years of experience in extensive experience in Civil Engineering and Infrastructure works, with a strong focus on the construction of underpasses, ramps, cut & cover tunnels, roads, and rail projects
  • In-depth knowledge of relevant authorities' requirements and regulations pertaining to construction projects
  • Proactive, with a strong sense of responsibility and exceptional interpersonal skills
  • Self-motivated and dynamic, with a proven ability to thrive in a demanding work environment
  • Capable of working independently and effectively under pressure, while also being a valuable team player
  • Proficiency in project management software such as Primavera, Microsoft Projects, and AutoCAD is advantageous
  • Salary package will be commensurate with experience

postedCompany.description:
Hwa Seng Builder Pte Ltd (HSB) is a leading civil engineering and construction provider, providing an integrated range of professional civil engineering works and construction-related services in the areas of Aircraft Pavement, Runway and Taxiway, Highways and Expressways, Vehicular Bridges, Drainage works, Earthwork, Golf Course, Roadways, Sewerage, all other Infrastructure works and General Building Construction.

HSB origin can be traced back to 1992, where it was established as part of an enabling strategy to tap their technical know-how, expertise and resources to provide clients with wide spectrum of construction and engineering services.

HSB financial strength is constantly assess by leading credit rating agency. Our sound track records, personnel, and financial standing are additional references when being evaluated for major public tenders.

Over the years, HSB has successfully completed numerous projects and have achieved and received many awards.

Today, by leveraging on our solid track records and expertise in the industry, HSB is registered with the Building & Construction Authority of Singapore under “A1” classification for Civil Engineering (CW02).

HSB unwavering commitment to world-class standards of quality and service can be seen in the many awards garnered. These include ISO 9001, ISO 14001, BS OHSAS 18001, bizSAFE STAR, LTA Certificate of Merit for Construction Environmental Award, LTA Safety Excellence Award and BCA Green & Gracious Award.
postedCompany.name: HWA SENG BUILDER PTE LTD
